title: Three questions for asset allocators: Politics, Nvidia and Bonds
section_path: Three questions for asset allocators: Politics, Nvidia and Bonds
section_path_text: Three questions for asset allocators: Politics, Nvidia and Bonds
summary:
Main
Are the markets any good at pricing in political risk? Is a 4.5% yield an opportunity or the new normal? By George Lagarias
Summary
The more the potential for government giveaways is reduced, the more world leaders are incentivised to make riskier decisions, and the more uncertain the outcomes.
